---
title: ""
---

# Publications & Presentations

This page summarizes manuscripts, conference presentations, posters, protocols, and public-facing research outputs.

## Manuscripts in preparation

### First epidemiological assessment of *Toxoplasma gondii* serological testing in Puerto Rico

**Working title:** First epidemiological assessment of *Toxoplasma gondii* serological testing in Puerto Rico: an analysis of NBS human diagnostic records

This manuscript examines human *Toxoplasma gondii* diagnostic testing records from Puerto Rico to provide an initial epidemiological assessment of exposure patterns across demographic and regional variables.

**Status:** In preparation

## Conference presentations

### UPRM Biology Symposium

**Title:** First Epidemiological Evidence of Human *Toxoplasma gondii* Exposure in Puerto Rico: a Retrospective Analysis of Diagnostic Records

**Authors:** Alan J. Figueroa Ruiz, Héctor G. Reyes Delgado, Karina S. Tapia Ortiz, and Alex J. Veglia

**Event:** Biology Symposium, University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez

**Format:** Oral presentation

## Posters

Poster presentations will be listed here as they are accepted and presented.

## Protocols and workflows

Research protocols, reproducible workflows, and methodological documents will be linked here.

Potential future links:

- Environmental sample collection protocols
- DNA extraction and qPCR workflows
- R-based epidemiological analysis pipeline
- Field sampling metadata templates
- Community outreach materials

## Selected research outputs

This section will eventually include downloadable posters, slides, GitHub repositories, protocols.io links, and manuscript links.
